title: Tank Car, Truck, and Ship Loaders
description: Load and unload chemicals and bulk solids, such as coal, sand, and grain, into or from tank cars, trucks, or ships, using material moving equipment. May perform a variety of other tasks relating to shipment of products. May gauge or sample shipping tanks and test them for leaks.

tasks.text: Seal outlet valves on tank cars, barges, and trucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify tank car, barge, or truck load numbers to ensure car placement accuracy based on written or verbal instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start pumps and adjust valves or cables to regulate the flow of products to vessels, using knowledge of loading procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check conditions and weights of vessels to ensure cleanliness and compliance with loading procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe positions of cars passing loading spouts, and swing spouts into the correct positions at the appropriate times.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor product movement to and from storage tanks, coordinating activities with other workers to ensure constant product flow.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Operate ship loading and unloading equipment, conveyors, hoists, and other specialized material handling equipment such as railroad tank car unloading equipment.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Record operating data such as products and quantities pumped, gauge readings, and operating times, manually or using computers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate industrial trucks, tractors, loaders, and other equipment to transport materials to and from transportation vehicles and loading docks, and to store and retrieve materials in warehouses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect ground cables to carry off static electricity when unloading tanker cars.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Copy and attach load specifications to loaded tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove and replace tank car dome caps, or direct other workers in their removal and replacement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test samples for specific gravity, using hydrometers, or send samples to laboratories for testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test vessels for leaks, damage, and defects, and repair or replace defective parts as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unload cars containing liquids by connecting hoses to outlet plugs and pumping compressed air into cars to force liquids into storage tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean interiors of tank cars or tank trucks, using mechanical spray nozzles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lower gauge rods into tanks or read meters to verify contents, temperatures, and volumes of liquid loads.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate conveyors and equipment to transfer grain or other materials from transportation vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform general warehouse activities, such as opening containers and crates, filling warehouse orders, assisting in taking inventory, and weighing and checking materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
